jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Rivigo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
